FeaturesGrid.title: Every tool your restaurant needs.
FeaturesGrid.description: One platform. Six powerful touchpoints. All managed from a single admin dashboard.

features.title: Instant Native Experience
features.description: Your menu opens instantly on any phone — no download, no sign-up, no waiting. Guests tap the QR code and they're browsing in under a second.

features.title: Product Banners
features.description: The very first thing guests see — admin-controlled hero banners and featured items that add to cart in a single tap.

features.title: Auto Push Notifications
features.description: Automatically re-engage every guest who scans. A timed push notification delivers your promo when it matters most — fully managed from your admin.

features.title: Event Promotions
features.description: Guests receive event notifications with 'Book now' and 'Remind me' to save directly to their calendar. No flyers, no follow-up calls.

features.title: TV Display App
features.description: Turn every venue screen into a live promo slideshow — products, events, partner ads — updated in real time from your admin.

features.title: One-Tap Service
features.description: Call Waiter and Call Receipt go straight to staff with the exact table number. Faster service, fewer interruptions, happier guests.

admin.description: Your admin controls every guest touchpoint — menu, marketing, events, staff, and TV screens — all at once, with no technical knowledge required.

apps.description: iOS and Android staff apps receive table requests, menu updates, and management alerts in real time — keeping service sharp and your team on the same page.
features: Real-time Call Waiter / Call Receipt alerts

HowItWorks.title: Up and running in minutes.
HowItWorks.description: No developers, no complicated onboarding. Three steps and your restaurant's entire marketing stack is live.
HowItWorks.trustLine: 30-day free trial · No charge until day 31 · Cancel anytime

steps.title: Set up your menu
steps.description: Upload a photo or PDF of your existing paper menu — AI builds the full menu for you, translated and localized across all supported languages. Most restaurants are live in under 10 minutes.

steps.title: Activate your marketing
steps.description: Configure banners, featured products, event promotions, and push notification content — all from the same admin. No extra tools, no extra logins.

steps.title: Every scan works for you
steps.description: Guests get a native app experience. Notifications fire automatically. TV screens update live. Staff get real-time service alerts. All hands-free.

FeaturesPageHero.description: Six powerful touchpoints — all managed from a single admin dashboard. No downloads required, no tech skills needed, no friction for your guests.

features.title: Instant Native Experience
features.description: One tap from a QR scan and your menu is open — no App Store download, no sign-up, no waiting. Feather uses iOS App Clip and Android instant web technology so guests get a fully native experience in under a second. It loads as fast and familiar as any app already on their phone.
bullets: iOS App Clip — no install; Android — optimized mobile web
Up to 3-second loading scene entertains while assets download
Loads as fast as any app already on their phone
Admin controls menu layout and categories from web or mobile app

features.title: Product Banners
features.description: Right below the service buttons, guests see a full-width banner image — the first marketing touchpoint in their browsing session. You set it up from your admin app by selecting a product and uploading an image. When a guest taps the banner, a product is added to their cart, an event page opens for booking, or they're redirected to any linked page. No searching, no extra steps. It's the perfect spotlight for signature cocktails, seasonal specials, or even paid supplier promotions.
bullets: Full-width hero banner — the first thing guests notice
Tap to add product to cart, open an event, or redirect to any URL
Perfect for high-margin items, seasonal specials, and partner promos
Fully managed from your admin app — update anytime, instantly

features.title: Auto Push Notifications
features.description: Every QR scan automatically schedules a push notification at a delay you choose — so your offer reaches guests while intent is still high. Tapping the notification opens a promo screen with a featured image or video, custom title, and an Order now button. Everything is managed from your admin app, with no technical setup required.
bullets: Fires automatically on every QR code scan — zero staff effort
Promo screen with image, video, title, description, and CTA
Content fully managed from your admin app
Opens a natural revenue channel for paid supplier promotions

features.title: Event Promotions
features.description: Just like product promotions, event notifications are triggered automatically when a guest scans your QR code. The reminder is sent at the delay your restaurant configures, whether that's 10 minutes or longer, keeping your event top-of-mind after the visit. Tapping the notification opens a custom event screen with an image or video, title, and description. Guests then get two clear next steps: Book now to call the venue directly, and Remind me to save the event to their calendar in one tap. Drive more bookings without flyers, follow-up calls, or extra staff effort.
bullets: Sent at your configured delay after each QR scan — just like product promos
"Book now" calls the venue, "Remind me" saves to their calendar
Custom image or video content set from the admin app
Fill more seats without flyers, posts, or staff time

features.title: TV Display App
features.description: Every screen in your venue becomes a live marketing channel — promoting your best items, upcoming events, and partner offers. Content updates in real time from your admin dashboard, so a new promo you set at the bar appears on every screen within seconds. Effortless in-venue marketing that keeps guests informed and engaged throughout their visit.
bullets: Products, events, and partner ads in a dynamic slideshow
Per-slide duration control — set how long each slide is shown
Real-time updates from admin push to all screens instantly
Opens a recurring revenue stream for partner & supplier advertising

features.title: One-Tap Service Requests
features.description: Just below your business info, guests see two clear action buttons: Call Waiter and Call Receipt. With a single tap, a request goes straight to your staff's app with the table number — no waving, no wondering if someone noticed. The right server knows exactly where to go, every time. This reduces delays, improves table turnover, and ensures every guest feels attended to. Faster service keeps guests happier, and happier guests order more and tip better.
bullets: "Call Waiter" and "Call Receipt" visible on every guest menu
Alerts go directly to staff app with the exact table number
Reduces delays and eliminates missed requests
Faster table turnover — guests order more, tip better

AboutPageHero.description: Feather helps restaurants turn every QR scan into a measurable growth channel with automated marketing, better in-venue service, and one dashboard for the entire guest journey.

AboutNarrative.title: Restaurants deserve tools that actually drive growth.
AboutNarrative.description1: Most digital menu tools stop at displaying items. Feather was built to do more: re-engage guests after every scan, promote high-margin products, and keep teams aligned in real time.
AboutNarrative.description2: Our goal is simple: remove friction for guests, remove manual work for staff, and make revenue impact visible for every venue.

points.title: Automation over extra workload

points.title: Conversion over vanity metrics
points.description: From first scan to completed order, every touchpoint is designed to move guests toward action.

points.title: One system over tool sprawl
points.description: Menu, promotions, events, service calls, and analytics stay connected in a single operating layer.

FaqPageMeta.title: FAQ — Feather Restaurant Marketing Platform
FaqPageMeta.description: Find quick answers about setup, pricing, notifications, integrations, and support for Feather.
FaqPageMeta.ogDescription: Find quick answers about setup, pricing, notifications, integrations, and support for Feather.

FaqPageHero.title: Your Feather questions, answered.
FaqPageHero.description: Everything you need to launch confidently and get value from day one.

FaqList.title: Everything you need to know
FaqList.description: From onboarding to billing and campaign setup, these are the questions we hear most often from restaurant teams.

items.question: How long does setup take?
items.answer: Most venues are live in under 10 minutes. Upload your menu file, review generated categories, and publish.

items.question: Do I need developers to launch Feather?
items.answer: No. Feather is built for restaurant operators and managers. The onboarding flow is fully self-serve.

items.question: Can I migrate from my current QR menu tool?
items.answer: Yes. You can import your menu content and replace your table QR codes gradually, so service is never interrupted.

items.question: How do push notifications work?
items.answer: Each QR scan can trigger an automated campaign after a delay you choose. You can send product promos, event reminders, or seasonal offers from the admin dashboard.

items.question: Can I promote events and collect reminders?
items.answer: Yes. Event campaigns can include clear calls to action such as booking links and calendar reminders.

items.question: Is TV Display content managed from the same dashboard?
items.answer: Yes. Promotions, products, and event creatives for in-venue screens are managed in the same admin area.

items.question: Do you offer a free trial?
items.answer: Yes. You can start with a 30-day free trial. Billing begins only after the trial period.

items.question: Can I cancel anytime?
items.answer: Yes. You can cancel from your account settings and your plan will not renew for the next cycle.

items.question: What support is included?
items.answer: Support depends on plan tier. All plans include core documentation and help resources, while higher tiers include faster direct support.

WhoIsItFor.title: Every restaurant is different.
WhoIsItFor.description: Pick the plan that matches where you are now — you can always scale up.
WhoIsItFor.learnMore: See how it works for you

benefits: Multi-venue dashboard — one login for all
TV Display App for every in-venue screen
Staff apps + real-time alerts + priority support

meta.title: How It Works — Feather Restaurant Marketing Platform
meta.description: See how Feather turns your QR menu into a full marketing engine in three simple steps. Up and running in under 10 minutes.

hero.title: Up and running in under 10 minutes.
hero.description: No developers, no complicated setup. Your digital menu, push notifications, and marketing tools go live in three steps.

items.question: Do I need a developer or any technical knowledge?
items.answer: No. If you can upload a photo, you can set up Feather. The AI handles menu building, translation, and categorisation automatically.

items.question: I already have a QR menu — can I switch?
items.answer: Yes. Upload your existing menu as a photo or PDF and Feather rebuilds it in minutes. You keep your QR codes and just update where they point.

items.question: How do push notifications reach my guests?
items.answer: Every QR scan triggers a push notification at a delay you set (e.g. 10 minutes). The guest receives it on their phone with your promo — no app download required for iOS App Clip users.

items.question: What happens after the 30-day trial?
items.answer: If you don't cancel before day 31, your plan begins and billing starts. You can cancel anytime from your account settings — no questions asked.

AnalyticsDashboard.title:
See exactly
what's working.
AnalyticsDashboard.description: Every scan, view, order, and service call is logged and surfaced in a clear admin dashboard — so you can stop guessing and start optimizing. Track engagement across every Feather feature in one place.
bullets: Live KPI metrics: Menu Opens, Product Views, Orders, Service Calls
Engagement funnel from first scan through to completed order
Menu opens over time with traffic source breakdown
Peak hours heatmap to staff and promote at the right moments
Banner & notification ROI funnels — see exactly what converts
Product views ranking and most-ordered items at a glance
Customer return rate to measure loyalty over any period
